     6→// This file contains shared scope transformation logic used by both the internal
     7→// metric store (pkg/metricstore) and the external cc-metric-store client
     8→// (internal/metricstoreclient). It extracts the common algorithm for mapping
     9→// between native metric scopes and requested scopes based on cluster topology.
    10→package metricstore
    11→
    12→import (
    13→	"strconv"
    14→
    15→	cclog "github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-lib/v2/ccLogger"
    16→	"github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-lib/v2/schema"
    17→)
    18→
    19→// Pre-converted scope strings avoid repeated string(MetricScope) allocations
    20→// during query construction. Used in ScopeQueryResult.Type field.
    21→var (
    22→	HWThreadString     = string(schema.MetricScopeHWThread)
    23→	CoreString         = string(schema.MetricScopeCore)
    24→	MemoryDomainString = string(schema.MetricScopeMemoryDomain)
    25→	SocketString       = string(schema.MetricScopeSocket)
    26→	AcceleratorString  = string(schema.MetricScopeAccelerator)
    27→)
    28→
    29→// ScopeQueryResult is a package-independent intermediate type returned by
    30→// BuildScopeQueries. Each consumer converts it to their own APIQuery type
    31→// (adding Resolution and any other package-specific fields).
    32→type ScopeQueryResult struct {
    33→	Type      *string
    34→	Metric    string
    35→	Hostname  string
    36→	TypeIds   []string
    37→	Scope     schema.MetricScope
    38→	Aggregate bool
    39→}
    40→
    41→// BuildScopeQueries generates scope query results for a given scope transformation.
    42→// It returns a slice of results and a boolean indicating success.
    43→// An empty slice means an expected exception (skip this combination).
    44→// ok=false means an unhandled case (caller should return an error).
    45→func BuildScopeQueries(
    46→	nativeScope, requestedScope schema.MetricScope,
    47→	metric, hostname string,
    48→	topology *schema.Topology,
    49→	hwthreads []int,
    50→	accelerators []string,
    51→) ([]ScopeQueryResult, bool) {
    52→	scope := nativeScope.Max(requestedScope)
    53→	results := []ScopeQueryResult{}
    54→
    55→	hwthreadsStr := IntToStringSlice(hwthreads)
    56→
    57→	// Accelerator -> Accelerator (Use "accelerator" scope if requested scope is lower than node)
    58→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeAccelerator && scope.LT(schema.MetricScopeNode) {
    59→		if scope != schema.MetricScopeAccelerator {
    60→			// Expected Exception -> Return Empty Slice
    61→			return results, true
    62→		}
    63→
    64→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
    65→			Metric:    metric,
    66→			Hostname:  hostname,
    67→			Aggregate: false,
    68→			Type:      &AcceleratorString,
    69→			TypeIds:   accelerators,
    70→			Scope:     schema.MetricScopeAccelerator,
    71→		})
    72→		return results, true
    73→	}
    74→
    75→	// Accelerator -> Node
    76→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeAccelerator && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
    77→		if len(accelerators) == 0 {
    78→			// Expected Exception -> Return Empty Slice
    79→			return results, true
    80→		}
    81→
    82→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
    83→			Metric:    metric,
    84→			Hostname:  hostname,
    85→			Aggregate: true,
    86→			Type:      &AcceleratorString,
    87→			TypeIds:   accelerators,
    88→			Scope:     scope,
    89→		})
    90→		return results, true
    91→	}
    92→
    93→	// HWThread -> HWThread
    94→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeHWThread && scope == schema.MetricScopeHWThread {
    95→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
    96→			Metric:    metric,
    97→			Hostname:  hostname,
    98→			Aggregate: false,
    99→			Type:      &HWThreadString,
   100→			TypeIds:   hwthreadsStr,
   101→			Scope:     scope,
   102→		})
   103→		return results, true
   104→	}
   105→
   106→	// HWThread -> Core
   107→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeHWThread && scope == schema.MetricScopeCore {
   108→		cores, _ := topology.GetCoresFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   109→		for _, core := range cores {
   110→			results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   111→				Metric:    metric,
   112→				Hostname:  hostname,
   113→				Aggregate: true,
   114→				Type:      &HWThreadString,
   115→				TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(topology.Core[core]),
   116→				Scope:     scope,
   117→			})
   118→		}
   119→		return results, true
   120→	}
   121→
   122→	// HWThread -> Socket
   123→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeHWThread && scope == schema.MetricScopeSocket {
   124→		sockets, _ := topology.GetSocketsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   125→		for _, socket := range sockets {
   126→			results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   127→				Metric:    metric,
   128→				Hostname:  hostname,
   129→				Aggregate: true,
   130→				Type:      &HWThreadString,
   131→				TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(topology.Socket[socket]),
   132→				Scope:     scope,
   133→			})
   134→		}
   135→		return results, true
   136→	}
   137→
   138→	// HWThread -> Node
   139→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeHWThread && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
   140→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   141→			Metric:    metric,
   142→			Hostname:  hostname,
   143→			Aggregate: true,
   144→			Type:      &HWThreadString,
   145→			TypeIds:   hwthreadsStr,
   146→			Scope:     scope,
   147→		})
   148→		return results, true
   149→	}
   150→
   151→	// Core -> Core
   152→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeCore && scope == schema.MetricScopeCore {
   153→		cores, _ := topology.GetCoresFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   154→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   155→			Metric:    metric,
   156→			Hostname:  hostname,
   157→			Aggregate: false,
   158→			Type:      &CoreString,
   159→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(cores),
   160→			Scope:     scope,
   161→		})
   162→		return results, true
   163→	}
   164→
   165→	// Core -> Socket
   166→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeCore && scope == schema.MetricScopeSocket {
   167→		sockets, _ := topology.GetSocketsFromCores(hwthreads)
   168→		for _, socket := range sockets {
   169→			results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   170→				Metric:    metric,
   171→				Hostname:  hostname,
   172→				Aggregate: true,
   173→				Type:      &CoreString,
   174→				TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(topology.Socket[socket]),
   175→				Scope:     scope,
   176→			})
   177→		}
   178→		return results, true
   179→	}
   180→
   181→	// Core -> Node
   182→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeCore && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
   183→		cores, _ := topology.GetCoresFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   184→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   185→			Metric:    metric,
   186→			Hostname:  hostname,
   187→			Aggregate: true,
   188→			Type:      &CoreString,
   189→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(cores),
   190→			Scope:     scope,
   191→		})
   192→		return results, true
   193→	}
   194→
   195→	// MemoryDomain -> MemoryDomain
   196→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeMemoryDomain && scope == schema.MetricScopeMemoryDomain {
   197→		memDomains, _ := topology.GetMemoryDomainsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   198→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   199→			Metric:    metric,
   200→			Hostname:  hostname,
   201→			Aggregate: false,
   202→			Type:      &MemoryDomainString,
   203→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(memDomains),
   204→			Scope:     scope,
   205→		})
   206→		return results, true
   207→	}
   208→
   209→	// MemoryDomain -> Socket
   210→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeMemoryDomain && scope == schema.MetricScopeSocket {
   211→		memDomains, _ := topology.GetMemoryDomainsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   212→		socketToDomains, err := topology.GetMemoryDomainsBySocket(memDomains)
   213→		if err != nil {
   214→			cclog.Errorf("Error mapping memory domains to sockets, return unchanged: %v", err)
   215→			// Rare Error Case -> Still Continue -> Return Empty Slice
   216→			return results, true
   217→		}
   218→
   219→		// Create a query for each socket
   220→		for _, domains := range socketToDomains {
   221→			results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   222→				Metric:    metric,
   223→				Hostname:  hostname,
   224→				Aggregate: true,
   225→				Type:      &MemoryDomainString,
   226→				TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(domains),
   227→				Scope:     scope,
   228→			})
   229→		}
   230→		return results, true
   231→	}
   232→
   233→	// MemoryDomain -> Node
   234→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeMemoryDomain && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
   235→		memDomains, _ := topology.GetMemoryDomainsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   236→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   237→			Metric:    metric,
   238→			Hostname:  hostname,
   239→			Aggregate: true,
   240→			Type:      &MemoryDomainString,
   241→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(memDomains),
   242→			Scope:     scope,
   243→		})
   244→		return results, true
   245→	}
   246→
   247→	// Socket -> Socket
   248→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeSocket && scope == schema.MetricScopeSocket {
   249→		sockets, _ := topology.GetSocketsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   250→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   251→			Metric:    metric,
   252→			Hostname:  hostname,
   253→			Aggregate: false,
   254→			Type:      &SocketString,
   255→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(sockets),
   256→			Scope:     scope,
   257→		})
   258→		return results, true
   259→	}
   260→
   261→	// Socket -> Node
   262→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeSocket && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
   263→		sockets, _ := topology.GetSocketsFromHWThreads(hwthreads)
   264→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   265→			Metric:    metric,
   266→			Hostname:  hostname,
   267→			Aggregate: true,
   268→			Type:      &SocketString,
   269→			TypeIds:   IntToStringSlice(sockets),
   270→			Scope:     scope,
   271→		})
   272→		return results, true
   273→	}
   274→
   275→	// Node -> Node
   276→	if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeNode && scope == schema.MetricScopeNode {
   277→		results = append(results, ScopeQueryResult{
   278→			Metric:   metric,
   279→			Hostname: hostname,
   280→			Scope:    scope,
   281→		})
   282→		return results, true
   283→	}
   284→
   285→	// Unhandled Case
   286→	return nil, false
   287→}

   289→// IntToStringSlice converts a slice of integers to a slice of strings.
   290→// Used to convert hardware thread/core/socket IDs from topology (int) to query TypeIds (string).
   291→// Optimized to reuse a byte buffer for string conversion, reducing allocations.
   292→func IntToStringSlice(is []int) []string {
   293→	if len(is) == 0 {
   294→		return nil
   295→	}
   296→
   297→	ss := make([]string, len(is))
   298→	buf := make([]byte, 0, 16) // Reusable buffer for integer conversion
   299→	for i, x := range is {
   300→		buf = strconv.AppendInt(buf[:0], int64(x), 10)
   301→		ss[i] = string(buf)
   302→	}
   303→	return ss
   304→}

   306→// SanitizeStats replaces NaN values in statistics with 0 to enable JSON marshaling.
   307→// If ANY of avg/min/max is NaN, ALL three are zeroed for consistency.
   308→func SanitizeStats(avg, min, max *schema.Float) {
   309→	if avg.IsNaN() || min.IsNaN() || max.IsNaN() {
   310→		*avg = schema.Float(0)
   311→		*min = schema.Float(0)
   312→		*max = schema.Float(0)
   313→	}
   314→}

     6→// Package metricstoreclient - Query Building
     7→//
     8→// This file contains the query construction and scope transformation logic for cc-metric-store queries.
     9→// It handles the complex mapping between requested metric scopes and native hardware topology,
    10→// automatically aggregating or filtering metrics as needed.
    11→//
    12→// # Scope Transformations
    13→//
    14→// The buildScopeQueries function implements the core scope transformation algorithm.
    15→// It handles 25+ different transformation cases, mapping between:
    16→//   - Accelerator (GPU) scope
    17→//   - HWThread (hardware thread/SMT) scope
    18→//   - Core (CPU core) scope
    19→//   - Socket (CPU package) scope
    20→//   - MemoryDomain (NUMA domain) scope
    21→//   - Node (full system) scope
    22→//
    23→// Transformations follow these rules:
    24→//   - Same scope: Return data as-is (e.g., Core → Core)
    25→//   - Coarser scope: Aggregate data (e.g., Core → Socket with Aggregate=true)
    26→//   - Finer scope: Error - cannot increase granularity
    27→//
    28→// # Query Building
    29→//
    30→// buildQueries and buildNodeQueries are the main entry points, handling job-specific
    31→// and node-specific query construction respectively. They:
    32→//   - Validate metric configurations
    33→//   - Handle subcluster-specific metric filtering
    34→//   - Detect and skip duplicate scope requests
    35→//   - Call buildScopeQueries for each metric/scope/host combination
    36→package metricstoreclient
    37→
    38→import (
    39→	"fmt"
    40→
    41→	"github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-backend/pkg/archive"
    42→	"github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-backend/pkg/metricstore"
    43→	cclog "github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-lib/v2/ccLogger"
    44→	"github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-lib/v2/schema"
    45→)
    46→
    47→// buildQueries constructs API queries for job-specific metric data.
    48→// It iterates through metrics, scopes, and job resources to build the complete query set.
    49→//
    50→// The function handles:
    51→//   - Metric configuration validation and subcluster filtering
    52→//   - Scope deduplication to avoid redundant queries
    53→//   - Hardware thread list resolution (job-allocated vs full node)
    54→//   - Delegation to buildScopeQueries for scope transformations
    55→//
    56→// Returns queries and their corresponding assigned scopes (which may differ from requested scopes).
    57→func (ccms *CCMetricStore) buildQueries(
    58→	job *schema.Job,
    59→	metrics []string,
    60→	scopes []schema.MetricScope,
    61→	resolution int,
    62→) ([]APIQuery, []schema.MetricScope, error) {
    63→	// Initialize both slices together
    64→	queries := make([]APIQuery, 0, len(metrics)*len(scopes)*len(job.Resources))
    65→	assignedScope := make([]schema.MetricScope, 0, len(metrics)*len(scopes)*len(job.Resources))
    66→
    67→	topology, err := ccms.getTopology(job.Cluster, job.SubCluster)
    68→	if err != nil {
    69→		cclog.Errorf("could not load cluster %s subCluster %s topology: %s", job.Cluster, job.SubCluster, err.Error())
    70→		return nil, nil, err
    71→	}
    72→
    73→	for _, metric := range metrics {
    74→		remoteName := metric
    75→		mc := archive.GetMetricConfig(job.Cluster, metric)
    76→		if mc == nil {
    77→			cclog.Warnf("metric '%s' is not specified for cluster '%s' - skipping", metric, job.Cluster)
    78→			continue
    79→		}
    80→
    81→		// Skip if metric is removed for subcluster
    82→		if len(mc.SubClusters) != 0 {
    83→			isRemoved := false
    84→			for _, scConfig := range mc.SubClusters {
    85→				if scConfig.Name == job.SubCluster && scConfig.Remove {
    86→					isRemoved = true
    87→					break
    88→				}
    89→			}
    90→			if isRemoved {
    91→				continue
    92→			}
    93→		}
    94→
    95→		// Avoid duplicates...
    96→		handledScopes := make([]schema.MetricScope, 0, 3)
    97→
    98→	scopesLoop:
    99→		for _, requestedScope := range scopes {
   100→			nativeScope := mc.Scope
   101→			if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeAccelerator && job.NumAcc == 0 {
   102→				continue
   103→			}
   104→
   105→			scope := nativeScope.Max(requestedScope)
   106→			for _, s := range handledScopes {
   107→				if scope == s {
   108→					continue scopesLoop
   109→				}
   110→			}
   111→			handledScopes = append(handledScopes, scope)
   112→
   113→			for _, host := range job.Resources {
   114→				hwthreads := host.HWThreads
   115→				if hwthreads == nil {
   116→					hwthreads = topology.Node
   117→				}
   118→
   119→				scopeResults, ok := metricstore.BuildScopeQueries(
   120→					nativeScope, requestedScope,
   121→					remoteName, host.Hostname,
   122→					topology, hwthreads, host.Accelerators,
   123→				)
   124→
   125→				if !ok {
   126→					return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("METRICDATA/EXTERNAL-CCMS > TODO: unhandled case: native-scope=%s, requested-scope=%s", nativeScope, requestedScope)
   127→				}
   128→
   129→				for _, sr := range scopeResults {
   130→					queries = append(queries, APIQuery{
   131→						Metric:     sr.Metric,
   132→						Hostname:   sr.Hostname,
   133→						Aggregate:  sr.Aggregate,
   134→						Type:       sr.Type,
   135→						TypeIds:    sr.TypeIds,
   136→						Resolution: resolution,
   137→					})
   138→					assignedScope = append(assignedScope, sr.Scope)
   139→				}
   140→			}
   141→		}
   142→	}
   143→
   144→	return queries, assignedScope, nil
   145→}
   146→
   147→// buildNodeQueries constructs API queries for node-specific metric data (Systems View).
   148→// Similar to buildQueries but uses full node topology instead of job-allocated resources.
   149→//
   150→// The function handles:
   151→//   - SubCluster topology resolution (either pre-loaded or per-node lookup)
   152→//   - Full node hardware thread lists (not job-specific subsets)
   153→//   - All accelerators on each node
   154→//   - Metric configuration validation with subcluster filtering
   155→//
   156→// Returns queries and their corresponding assigned scopes.
   157→func (ccms *CCMetricStore) buildNodeQueries(
   158→	cluster string,
   159→	subCluster string,
   160→	nodes []string,
   161→	metrics []string,
   162→	scopes []schema.MetricScope,
   163→	resolution int,
   164→) ([]APIQuery, []schema.MetricScope, error) {
   165→	// Initialize both slices together
   166→	queries := make([]APIQuery, 0, len(metrics)*len(scopes)*len(nodes))
   167→	assignedScope := make([]schema.MetricScope, 0, len(metrics)*len(scopes)*len(nodes))
   168→
   169→	for _, metric := range metrics {
   170→		remoteName := metric
   171→		mc := archive.GetMetricConfig(cluster, metric)
   172→		if mc == nil {
   173→			cclog.Warnf("metric '%s' is not specified for cluster '%s'", metric, cluster)
   174→			continue
   175→		}
   176→
   177→		// Skip if metric is removed for subcluster
   178→		if mc.SubClusters != nil {
   179→			isRemoved := false
   180→			for _, scConfig := range mc.SubClusters {
   181→				if scConfig.Name == subCluster && scConfig.Remove {
   182→					isRemoved = true
   183→					break
   184→				}
   185→			}
   186→			if isRemoved {
   187→				continue
   188→			}
   189→		}
   190→
   191→		// Avoid duplicates...
   192→		handledScopes := make([]schema.MetricScope, 0, 3)
   193→
   194→	scopesLoop:
   195→		for _, requestedScope := range scopes {
   196→			nativeScope := mc.Scope
   197→
   198→			scope := nativeScope.Max(requestedScope)
   199→			for _, s := range handledScopes {
   200→				if scope == s {
   201→					continue scopesLoop
   202→				}
   203→			}
   204→			handledScopes = append(handledScopes, scope)
   205→
   206→			for _, hostname := range nodes {
   207→				var topology *schema.Topology
   208→				var err error
   209→
   210→				// If no subCluster given, get it by node
   211→				if subCluster == "" {
   212→					topology, err = ccms.getTopologyByNode(cluster, hostname)
   213→				} else {
   214→					topology, err = ccms.getTopology(cluster, subCluster)
   215→				}
   216→
   217→				if err != nil {
   218→					return nil, nil, err
   219→				}
   220→
   221→				// Always full node hwthread id list, no partial queries expected -> Use "topology.Node" directly where applicable
   222→				// Always full accelerator id list, no partial queries expected -> Use "acceleratorIds" directly where applicable
   223→				acceleratorIds := topology.GetAcceleratorIDs()
   224→
   225→				// Moved check here if metric matches hardware specs
   226→				if nativeScope == schema.MetricScopeAccelerator && len(acceleratorIds) == 0 {
   227→					continue scopesLoop
   228→				}
   229→
   230→				scopeResults, ok := metricstore.BuildScopeQueries(
   231→					nativeScope, requestedScope,
   232→					remoteName, hostname,
   233→					topology, topology.Node, acceleratorIds,
   234→				)
   235→
   236→				if !ok {
   237→					return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("METRICDATA/EXTERNAL-CCMS > TODO: unhandled case: native-scope=%s, requested-scope=%s", nativeScope, requestedScope)
   238→				}
   239→
   240→				for _, sr := range scopeResults {
   241→					queries = append(queries, APIQuery{
   242→						Metric:     sr.Metric,
   243→						Hostname:   sr.Hostname,
   244→						Aggregate:  sr.Aggregate,
   245→						Type:       sr.Type,
   246→						TypeIds:    sr.TypeIds,
   247→						Resolution: resolution,
   248→					})
   249→					assignedScope = append(assignedScope, sr.Scope)
   250→				}
   251→			}
   252→		}
   253→	}
   254→
   255→	return queries, assignedScope, nil
   256→}
   257→
